name: BitcoinOS
description: Full-stack development for a suite of Bitcoin-native products focused on protocol-level innovation and user experience. Responsibilities spanned building responsive frontend interfaces and designing scalable backend services, working across the full product lifecycle in a fast-moving, research-driven environment.
stack: TypeScript · Node.js · React · SQL · RabbitMQ · Docker

name: Defensync Israel
description: Design and frontend development for a cutting-edge unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) defense system. Translated complex operational requirements into clean, functional interfaces, working closely with the engineering team to deliver a precise and reliable user experience for a high-stakes domain.

name: Deweb (BBS Network)
description: Worked as part of a collaborative team designing and implementing new features and UI components for a blockchain-based social media platform. The platform aimed to decentralize the web through user-owned, community-governed message boards with integrated tokenized incentives for creators.
stack: ReactJS · TypeScript · Redux · Tailwind CSS · Firestore

name: Freelance — Web Designer & Development
description: Independently designed and developed commercial websites for a range of clients, handling the full process from requirements gathering and UX design through to implementation and launch. Projects included gender-equality.co.il and other client sites requiring custom design and functionality.
